scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix user-service" "npm run start --prefix document-service" "npm run start --prefix order-service" "npm run start --prefix vendor-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix user-service && npm install --prefix document-service && npm install --prefix order-service && npm install --prefix vendor-service && npm install --prefix frontend
